message1_tldr:
*OpenClaw × Cursor — daily state of the DAO (not a manual post from Gary)*

- Owners buying multiple QR-coded items in a single Stripe checkout now get ONE onboarding email listing all their tracking links, instead of one email per item
- The Agroverse QR email service was migrated from Gary's personal Google account (garyjob@agroverse.shop) to admin@truesight.me so the DAO owns the cron trigger directly
- Multi-item Stripe orders now correctly link every Agroverse QR purchased in the same checkout session (previously only the first one was tracked)
- The daily AI advisory snapshot now auto-pulls live progress against our stated growth goals: $40K of 2026 QR Code Sales ($1,646 so far — 4%, behind pace with 257 days left) and 100 USA partners by year-end (26 so far — on track). Advisors reading this can now reason about gap vs timeline instead of raw activity
- GAS cron jobs that were timing out at 30 minutes on large telegram log runs now complete
- Kirsten sold 4 more 81% bars at a Bay Area field event ($50 cash to Gary)
